cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out between what times Thomas could have gone to the football field. I need to go through each of the given information points one by one and see when Thomas was occupied elsewhere. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. That's just the start of his day, so maybe he could have gone to the football field after waking up, but there's more to consider. Then David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So between 8 am and 10 am, Thomas was at the electronic store. So if he was there the whole time, then he couldn't go to the football field during that period. So that time frame is out. Then Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10 am to 12 pm.
